sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - NYINC Signature Sale 3129, Lot 34101 — Ancients
Julian II, as Caesar (AD 360-363). AV solidus (21mm, 4.39 gm, 12h). NGC MS 5/5 - 3/5. Arles, ca. AD 355-360. D N CL IVLIANVS NOB CAES, bare-headed, draped, and cuirassed bust of Julian II rig
sales.description:
Ancients
Julian II, as Caesar (AD 360-363). AV solidus (21mm, 4.39 gm, 12h). NGC MS 5/5 - 3/5. Arles, ca. AD 355-360. D N CL IVLIANVS NOB CAES, bare-headed, draped, and cuirassed bust of Julian II right / GLORIA-REI-PVBLICAE, Roma (on left), seated facing, spear in left hand, and Constantinoplis (on right), seated facing, head left, right foot on prow below, scepter cradled in left hand, jointly supporting between them wreath surrounding legend VO / TIS / V in three lines; star left of prow, K...
